final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: interior architectural photo, moody editorial
Primary request: dark gothic castle interior with towering vaulted ceilings, stained glass windows casting blood-red light, candle holders and iron chains as decor, heavy shadows
Scene/backdrop: grand medieval castle hall, towering Gothic arches, ornate iron fixtures, flickering candlelight
Subject: imposing Gothic architecture, intricate stone carvings, heavy iron chains hanging from walls, antique candelabras
Style/medium: dark fantasy photography, chiaroscuro lighting, atmospheric interior
Composition/framing: wide shot from ground level looking upward to emphasize scale of vaulted ceilings, 24mm lens
Lighting/mood: blood-red light filtering through stained glass, deep shadows, candlelight glow, mysterious and oppressive atmosphere
Color palette: deep crimson red, charcoal black, stone gray, warm amber candlelight
Materials/textures: weathered stone walls, cold iron chains, aged wood, translucent stained glass, wax drips
Constraints: maintain heavy shadow dominance, keep blood-red light as primary color source
Avoid: bright daylight, cheerful colors, clean modern surfaces, cartoonish rendering, watermark
